# Agents Guide

## Target Naming Conventions

* When generating intermediate or supplementary build targets within macros (e.g. `foo_build` from a `foo` macro), prefer using the dot (`.`) separator instead of an underscore (`_`).
  * Example: `name + ".build"` instead of `name + "_build"`.
  * This makes it visually clear which targets are human-defined and which are automatically generated by the rules.
